description: This pipeline exports a results table to CSV/XLSX using 'iji-export-table-v2' node '253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6'. The pipeline starts with '4e2f47b3-a065-4515-98d0-07b14f34dbca' and ends with '253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6'.

253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6.name: iji-export-table-v2
253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

4e2f47b3-a065-4515-98d0-07b14f34dbca.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
4e2f47b3-a065-4515-98d0-07b14f34dbca.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.
